title: Use appropriate @DirtiesContext modes
description: Tests annotated with @DirtiesContext should specify the correct mode to avoid unnecessary context resets. Using the wrong mode can lead to inefficient test execution and unpredictable results. Always choose the mode that matches the test's requirements for context cleanup.
recommendation: Review and update @DirtiesContext annotations to use the most suitable mode for each test.

checks.message: Specify appropriate mode for @DirtiesContext annotation to avoid inefficient test execution.
